_comment: YOUR application pipeline — you own this file. verify.py merges it into roles.json each run; the bot never overwrites it. pinned_roles = manually-tracked applications (kept even when closed). overrides = auto-discovered roles you've applied to (attaches pinned + app stage).

pinned_roles.role: Senior Data Science Manager, Driving Quality
pinned_roles.note: Top-tier brand and an Alphabet balance sheet, but be clear-eyed: 'Driving Quality' is AV safety/operational DS — measuring autonomy performance — not the product/growth/monetization wedge you sell best. Sell transferable 0→1 leadership + measurement/north-star rigor (your Mercury final-panel material maps well here). Strong optionality bet; not a domain-perfect fit. No referral mapped yet — worth a Waymo/Google network sweep before the recruiter screen.

app.note: APPLIED 6/27 (confirmation + candidate survey received from Waymo TA). Next: sweep LinkedIn for 1st/2nd° at Waymo/Google to warm a referral before recruiter contact. Lead with measurement rigor and 0→1 org-building, not 'product analytics.'

referral.text: No referral mapped yet — run a Waymo/Google network sweep.

pinned_roles.note: CLOSED — rejected after final panel (6/24). Your highest-conviction, best-fit role of the search: full process through HM (Leanne Fretz), peer, cross-functional, and final panel. Ryan Atkins (recruiter) was genuinely complimentary and explicitly asked to stay connected for future roles — keep that relationship warm, it's a real asset. Lesson to carry: the wedge fit was perfect; refine the final-panel narrative (team restructure / north-star / contingency) for the next at-bat.

app.note: Rejected 6/26 by Ryan Atkins after the 6/24 final panel. 'Genuinely impressed by the depth of your experience… you stood out in a competitive process.' Wants to keep you in mind for future Mercury roles. Send a gracious keep-in-touch reply to Ryan; reconnect in ~6–8 weeks.

referral.text: Ran full process. 1st° backchannel: Oneida Dueñas (Risk, ex-Intuit). 2nd° intel: Prateek Parashar (Staff DS, Growth), Katja Wittfoth (Sr DS), Shannon Hees (Sr DS, Product Analytics). Keep Ryan Atkins (recruiter) warm for re-entry.

pinned_roles.note: CLOSED — rejected. Was your recommended bridge: top-tier brand, consumption-monetization model that fit your pricing/monetization wedge, applied via Mario Heredia (1st°). Didn't reach a screen despite the warm referral. Mario remains a valuable channel — keep him in the network, this one just didn't land.

app.note: REJECTED (reported by Rodrigo 6/27; no rejection email in Gmail — likely came via recruiter/LinkedIn). Came in via Mario Heredia's 1st° referral and still didn't convert to a recruiter screen — a real signal the Product DS req was either filled or not a fit. Keep Mario warm (strong ongoing referral channel); thank him regardless of outcome.

referral.text: Confirmed referral. 1st°: Mario Heredia (Data Science / AI / Leadership, 60+ mutuals) — your referrer + intel channel. 2nd° likely hiring chain: Hamin Oh (Director, Data, Analytics & AI; via sahithi visvanathan & Trevor Scollins — top person to understand), Kamer Toker-Yildiz (Data Science Leader, Bay Area; via Abhishek Ghuwalewala), Satya Kota (Director, Data Engineering — adjacent). Peers: Peter L. (Sr DS), Si Peng (DS&AI, ex-Apple).

pinned_roles.note: Your best Director swing. AI-native with strong trajectory; the Director title is the scope upgrade you want. The cost is a domain pivot to clinical/healthcare — sell transferable 0→1 leadership, not domain depth. Applied and reached out to contacts; awaiting response.

app.note: Applied + reached out to contacts; no response yet. Best Director bet on the board — worth a follow-up nudge.

referral.text: Reached out to contacts at Abridge (pending reply).

pinned_roles.note: Elite company, but Infrastructure DS is platform/internal-reliability work — off your product/growth/monetization wedge. You applied with an internal referral and got no recruiter contact, which confirms the fit was thin. Don't invest further.

app.note: Applied + internal referral; no recruiter contact. Off-wedge (infra, not product/growth) — low expected pull. Treat as cold.

referral.text: You have an internal referral here (applied).

pinned_roles.role: Senior Manager Data Science, Revenue & Growth
pinned_roles.note: The Revenue & Growth mandate fits your monetization/growth wedge well, but you graded the company as failing your own high-growth bar. Reached out via recruiters with no response. Keep as low-priority volume, not a focus.

app.note: Reached out via recruiters; no response. Role fits the wedge but company fails your high-growth bar — low priority.

pinned_roles.note: Was the sharpest domain match on the board — lending, banking, monetization, financial products is exactly your wedge. The req has since been pulled. Worth watching for a reopen or a sibling lending/growth req.

app.note: Role closed per SoFi. Strongest domain fit on the list — set an alert for a reopen or adjacent lending/growth req.

pinned_roles.note: Director title was the appeal, but post-Grammarly-acquisition trajectory and DS-org scope are murky, and it was your weakest Director bet. Recruiter passed. Closed out.

app.note: Recruiter passed. Weakest Director bet anyway — limited downside to losing it.

pinned_roles.note: GTM Data Science is sales/marketing-ops analytics — off your product/monetization wedge. Triaged as a pass. Note: the Adobe *Director, Data Science & Analytics* role (also tracked here) is the better Adobe target.

app.note: Passed — GTM/marketing analytics, off-wedge. Pursue the Adobe Director, DS & Analytics role instead.

pinned_roles.role: Senior Director II, Data Science — USRM Complex Components
pinned_roles.note: Senior Director II is a real title/scope step-up, but flag the trade-offs honestly: USRM (US Retail Markets) insurance DS is off your fintech/product/growth wedge, and Liberty Mutual fails your own high-growth / strong-trajectory bar (mature, slow-moving carrier). Optionality and AI exposure are limited. Treat as a title-and-comp volume play, not a focus — useful as a Director-level interview rep if it converts.

app.note: APPLIED 6/18 (auto-confirmation via iCIMS, req 2026-76408). No recruiter contact yet. Low priority — off-wedge domain + fails growth bar. Don't invest beyond a screen unless they move fast.
